subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! Though I have not written you a spiritual letter, yet have I kept the friends before my eyes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران رحمانی هر چند بشما نامه روحانی ننگاشتم ولی یاران را در نظر داشتم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @fulfillment of true potential, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @importance of community building
